case_title: SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT VS. ROBERT BASE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY (CCP 585(4)) RE: LOSS OF ORIGINAL LEASE EVID. CODE 1501, 1551 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION
